productDisplayName: Puma Women Fitness Lux Grey Handbag
description: This subtly stylish oversized bag from puma is a great fashion offering from the sportswear brand. The fabric has a lovely sheen to it, giving the look of hi-tech Sports fabric but with a touch of glitter. Crafted in gun-metal grey, this bag is perfectly complemented by the gold coloured logo, another subtle blending of sports and chic. Whatever you have to carry, give your outfit a touch of class with this puma bag. Height: 35cm Width: 52cm Nylon bag with synthetic leather edging around the handles One main large compartment One internal zip pocket and one internal open pocket Two open compartments on the front Lightly padded base to protect contents Gold coloured metal zip pulls and Puma cat emblem attached to front 'V' shape created with fabric on front as decoration Care Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent
